post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 312: Fruit Show Mafia

”What do you mean a fruit show? Like a fruit-growing competition?”
“No not at all! It’s... you know how they have dog shows where people bring their dogs and they do tricks and stuff but really it’s an excuse to see how cute they all are. It’s like that but for fruit”
“But what sort of categories would they have? The fruit can’t really move in the same ways as dogs”
“Hmph! I’ll figure it out. Anyhow can we do it? Please???”
“Alright, but I’m warning you it might not be very popular”
“What do you mean??? People love looking at fruits”
“Uh. Sure. Anyhow, I was moreso referring to the participants. I’ll try my best but keep in mind we might need to work with small numbers”
“You really need to get a better attitude on these things. I’m sure we’ll get lots of people! Who wouldn’t want to bring their fruit to a fruit show?? Especially with the grand prize!”
"Ok so what do you need my help with"
"You can do the advertising, the decorating, and the hire-a-camera-operator-ing"
"And you will..."
"I'll be coming up with the categories. ... And the rules"
"Alright then, if you're sure about this."
"It'll be fun! May the best fruit win!!"
 
 
- Important Rules -
This tab summarizes the most important rules for easy reference.
 
For experienced players: everything you need is here, and in the setup tab.
For new players: you may find it useful to familiarize yourself with the rest of the rules.
 
Integrity
  • Do not edit or delete your posts, even for typos. Just post again.
  • Do not OOT (Out of Thread) and talk about this game outside this thread, your role PM, or approved private chats, even if you are dead. Access to spectator chats will be granted upon request.
  • Do not gamethrow or intentionally sabotage your wincondition.
  • Do not attach files or link to external documents concerning this game. Discussions must stay in this thread.
  • Do not use OGI (Out of Game Information). Publicly discussed reads should be made exclusively from information in this thread or past completed games.
 
Activity
  • Each "Day" is 8 days while each "Night" is 2 days.
  • Do not post during night.
  • All times will be in Pacific Standard Time (PST, UTC-8) or Pacific Daylight Time (PDT, UTC-7) as applicable.
  • Activity rules are 48 hours to first PM prod, 72 hours to second PM prod, and 96 hours to replacement status.
 
Voting
  • You must format your votes correctly. Capitalization does not matter, and capital i/lowercase L are not differentiated.
  • Both bold vote and code vote formats are accepted, although bold is preferred. Refer to the Voting tab if you do not know what these are.
  • Majority hang is on
  • The game uses fdas's hybrid hang system in the event that the deadline passes without a majority vote
  • Votes are locked at LYLO.
 
Etiquette and Warnings
 
  • Use common sense.
  • Do not use formatting that makes text hard to read.
  • You may attack a player’s opinion, but do not make personal attacks on players themselves.
  • Disagreements should be resolved in a way that does not affect gameplay.
  • Do not discuss rule violations by other players in the thread; contact the moderators privately.
  • First-timers can receive up to 3 warnings before their next offense results in a force replacement or modkill. All other players can receive up to 2.
  • Players may be replaced at the moderators' discretion for procedural difficulties.
  • All other rules are standard.
 
Setup and Moderators
 
  • This game is based on the mountainous setup.
  • Mafia have access to daychat.
  • This game is moderated by ad333 & aidan0626.
  • This game operates optional discord spectator and mafia private chats using the Unpaid Intern Central server. Contact the mods to request access.
 
Resources and Support
 
  • For any issues, you may contact us through your role PM or through Discord (@akesi).
  • For a list of basic resources, refer to the Resources tab below.
  • For a more extensive list of resources compiled by the UIMT, go here.
  • If this game is causing you significant stress or frustration, feel free to use your role PM to talk or vent. We may not be allowed to give you technical advice, but we can listen or help you find a better way to process events. You may also contact us via Discord if you prefer.

  • General
    Credits to Binomial-theorem, chaotic_iak, willwang123, and fdas, among others, as well as the Mafia Universe forum rules, for the rule template.
     
    The following are standard mafia game rules.
     
     
    • Do not post during the night phase.
    • Do not talk about this game's events outside of this thread unless you are specifically given permission to do so by the moderators. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread. Referring to anything that has happened in an ongoing game, even if you do not say which game it is, is OOT.
    • If you are dead, do not post, and do not talk about this game anywhere else. You may still spectate; access to spoiled and unspoiled spectator chats will be offered.
    • Do not use any formatting that obscures or conceals text. This includes [color=#FFFFFF], [color=white], and [color=transparent].
    • Do not edit or delete posts, even for typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON as appropriate.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mods, including role PMs.
    • Do not impersonate the mods.
    • Do not lie to the mods.
    • Do not abuse loopholes in the rules. Intent will be considered during rule enforcement.
    • You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications.
  • Votes and Hangs
    This tab covers voting, unvoting, No Hangs, and hangs.
     
     
    • Votes must be in this format to be counted: Vote: [player username].
    • By default, votes should be made in [b] (bold) tags. However, votes made in [code] and [c] tags will also be accepted.
    • Usernames in votes must be spelled, but not necessarily capitalized, correctly. Do not use nicknames.
    • For the purposes of voting, I (capital i) and l (lowercase L) are considered identical.
    • For example, both Vote: mathjay and Vote: mAtHjAy are valid votes, but vote: mathjay, Vote: jay, Vote: mathjay., Vote:mathjay, Vote: mathjay, and Vote: mathjay are invalid.
    • Votes followed by extraneous punctuation that is similarly formatted, even with separate tags, are invalid.
    • Votes in hide, tip, or quote tags do not count.
    • Vote to hang no one by posting Vote: No Hang.
    • Unvote by posting Unvote. You do not have to unvote before voting again.
    • Votecounts will be posted periodically. Players may request a new VC in bold or in their role PM.
    • Invalid votes will not count under any circumstances. Consider notifying the mods in your role PM if you want to purposely fakevote.
    • Valid votes will always be counted unless they are clearly unintentional. There is no guarantee that an accidental vote will not be counted.
    • Votes will be carried over if a player is replaced.
    • The Not Voting section should be ignored if it contradicts another part of the votecount (VC).
    • If an error in the votecount is not pointed out within 2 days or by the next EOD, whichever is sooner, the incorrect VC will become official.
    • This game uses a hybrid hang system. If a player is voted by the majority of living players, then that player will be hanged immediately; and if No Hang is voted by half of living players, a No Hang will occur.
    • If the deadline is met and no player has been hanged, the amount of votes required for a Hang or a No Hang will be reduced by 1. The vote threshold will reduce by 1 vote every 24 hours after this. For example, if there are 8 players alive in the game, 5 votes will be required to hang someone and 4 votes are required for a no hang. Once the deadline passes, 4 votes will be sufficient to hang someone and 3 votes are sufficient for a no hang. 24 hours after the deadline, 3 votes will be sufficient to hang someone and 2 votes are sufficient for a no hang.
    • If the vote threshold is decreased and two or more options have both reached the threshold required, then the game will enter tiebreak. During tiebreak, votes can continue to be changed. If at any point in time, only one option has enough votes to meet the threshold required for the option to be enacted, day will immediately end. Or, if any option gains votes and now exceeds the vote threshold by an amount of votes strictly greater than the amount of votes any other option exceeds their vote threshold by, that option will win and day will immediately end. If 24 hours have passed since tiebreak has begun, and the votes are still deadlocked, there will be no hang.
    • Upon reaching LYLO (Hang-or-Lose), votes will be locked, meaning that they cannot be changed.
    • Deadline hang is off at LYLO. If a majority hang is not reached by the deadline, the day will end without a hang, resulting in an automatic win for the mafia team.
    • If a hammer has occurred and the EOD has not been declared, the game will proceed into twilight. Players may still post, but no more votes or unvotes will be counted.
    • Once the moderators declare the EOD, the person hanged will be officially eliminated and their role revealed. Night will then immediately begin.
  • Activity
    This tab covers deadlines, activity rules, V/LAs, and replacements.
     
     
    • All times will be in Pacific Standard Time (PST, UTC-8) or Pacific Daylight Time (PDT, UTC-7) as applicable, unless otherwise noted.
    • Each day phase will be 192 hours (8 days), and each night phase will be 48 hours (2 days).
    • The moderators may extend deadlines at their discretion.
    • The current deadline can be found in the bottom of the OP (Original Post, or post #1).
    • If the mafia anticipates being unavailable during the night phase, they may submit any night actions to be performed in advance.
    • If the mafia has not submitted their action by 24 hours before the night deadline, a reminder will be sent.
    • If the moderators do not receive an NA submission from any mafia by the night deadline, the mafia will not perform an action that night.
    • Night will end when the moderators make a post declaring the end of night (EON). You may not post in the thread until then, even if the night deadline has passed. Instead, PM the mods for updates if they miss a deadline.
    • Players who are temporarily unable to fulfill activity requirements can declare a V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence) by posting the V/LA dates in bold in-thread or in their role PM. Players on a V/LA will not be prodded.
    • V/LAs should be shorter than five days. For longer absences, contact the moderators for options.
    • Players who no longer wish to or are unable to play in this game can request replacement by posting Request Replacement in-thread or in their role PM.
    • Players who have replaced out generally will not be allowed to replace back in.
    • Players will receive their first PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 48 hours and are not on V/LA. Details on "game-advancing post" are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • Players will receive their second PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 72 hours and are not on V/LA.
    • Players will be replaced if they have not made a game-advancing post for 96 hours and are not on V/LA, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement.
    • If a player receives 4 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
    • If a player reaches replacement status more than once, they will be replaced.
    • Activity Checks (ACs) will be posted periodically. Players may request a new AC in bold or in their role PM.
    • Activity will reset overnight. Players will not receive prods between twilight and daystart.
    • If you have access to a private topic, you may request that a partner be poked. The moderators will send a notification via PM to the specified player, but this will not count as an official prod.
    • If a player is postbanned by the AoPS Sheriff, they will be replaced. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
  • Integrity and Etiquette
    This tab covers integrity recommendations, player etiquette, warning limits, and examples of inconsiderate gameplay.
     
     
    • Do not gamethrow.
    • Do not discuss player alignments based on V/LAs, replacements, warnings, force replacements, modkills, or other interactions with moderators.
    • Do not discuss rule violations, especially violations by other players in the thread. If you wish, contact the moderators privately through your role PM or Discord.
    • Any significant, game-related, and intentionally exclusive player-to-player communication outside of moderator-sanctioned channels is prohibited.
    • Do not publicly reference OGI (Out of Game Information) in reads or create situations outside the thread that players could reasonably consider alignment indicative.
     
    The above rules are attempts to preserve the spirit of the game and should not affect most players. For specific details and examples, click here.
     
     
    • Do not make personal attacks. You may attack a player's opinion, but do not demean the player themselves.
    • Do not spam.
    • Follow AoPS Community Guidelines and the AoPS Terms of Service.
    • Be mature and use common sense.
    • Behavior that disrupts the game for players and makes it unreasonably hard for them to read and play may result in a warning.
      Causing significant disruptions to gameplay may result in a force replacement at the moderators' discretion.
    • For minor rule infractions, first-timers can receive up to three warnings, while all other players can receive up to two. A player may receive multiple warnings for a single infraction.
     
    The above rules broadly address most etiquette issues. For specific details and examples of improper behavior, click here.
  • - Moderation Policies -
  • Moderator Information
    This tab provides technical information about this game.
     
     
    • ad333 and aidan0626 are the moderators of Mafia Game 312.
    • OTHER CONTRIBUTORS/UNPAID INTERNS have contributed to flavor, setup, OCRSTM, feedback, and management of the private chat discord system.
    • This game uses the Unpaid Intern Central consolidated private chat system. Participants of this game will be granted access as appropriate.
    • Red text is used for votecounts, warnings, and other announcements by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related text.
    • Blue text is used for activity checks, confirm counts, and other non-essential posts by the moderators.
    • Green text is used for town flavor-related text.
    • Custom shades of these colors may be used for aesthetic purposes.
    • Current custom shades are: Town flavor green v.2 (#2be368) and Activity Check blue (#005dff). For a full list of custom colors, click here.
    • The moderators may change the rules at any time. Major rule changes will be announced at the bottom of the OP. All changes will also be noted in the modlog and OCRSTM Version History.
    • Players will not be retroactively penalized for violating new rules.
    • Major changes to the OP may be made in between games. The most important changes will be noted in the OCRSTM Version History.
    • The moderators pledge to treat players fairly and keep moderator interventions to a minimum; however, we reserve the right to make the final judgement in the moderation of this game.
     
    MG312 OP is based on Overcomplicated RulesetTM (OCRSTM) 10.
    Current version: 10.0.1
    Version History
     
    OCRSTM 10 is available for public use. If you are interested in using OCRSTM in your own games, click here.
Setup
This game is based on the Mountainous setup. This is an open setup.
 
In this setup, there are 17 players. There are 14 Vanilla Townies & 3 Mafia Goons.
Other important setup mechanics:
  • Mafia have daychat.
  • Mafia factional nks are not compulsive.
  • Flavor is not alignment indicative. Claim it if you want

Role PMs
Vanilla Townie PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are [flavorname], Vanilla Townie.

[flavor]

You have no power besides your voice & your vote.
You win when all of the Mafia are dead.
Confirm by acknowledging your alignment in your role PM.
Good luck!
Mafia Goon PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are, [flavorname], Mafia Goon.

[flavor]

You can speak with your partners, Player X & Player Y, and submit your factional nightkill each night here.
You win when you reach parity with the Town.
Confirm by acknowledging your alignment in your role PM.
Good luck!

post_canonical:
[center][size=160]Welcome to Mafia Game 312: Fruit Show Mafia[/size]

”What do you mean a fruit show? Like a fruit-growing competition?”
“No not at all! It’s... you know how they have dog shows where people bring their dogs and they do tricks and stuff but really it’s an excuse to see how cute they all are. It’s like that but for fruit”
“But what sort of categories would they have? The fruit can’t really move in the same ways as dogs”
“Hmph! I’ll figure it out. Anyhow can we do it? Please???”
“Alright, but I’m warning you it might not be very popular”
“What do you mean??? People love looking at fruits”
“Uh. Sure. Anyhow, I was moreso referring to the participants. I’ll try my best but keep in mind we might need to work with small numbers”
“You really need to get a better attitude on these things. I’m sure we’ll get lots of people! Who wouldn’t want to bring their fruit to a fruit show?? Especially with the grand prize!”
"Ok so what do you need my help with"
"You can do the advertising, the decorating, and the hire-a-camera-operator-ing"
"And you will..."
"I'll be coming up with the categories. ... And the rules"
"Alright then, if you're sure about this."
"It'll be fun! May the best fruit win!!"
[/center]

[b]This tab covers deadlines, activity rules, V/LAs, and replacements.[/b]
 
 
[list][*]All times will be in Pacific Standard Time (PST, UTC-8) or Pacific Daylight Time (PDT, UTC-7) as applicable, unless otherwise noted.
[*]Each day phase will be 192 hours (8 days), and each night phase will be 48 hours (2 days). 
[*]The moderators may extend deadlines at their discretion.
[*]The current deadline can be found in the bottom of the OP (Original Post, or post #1). 
[*]If the mafia anticipates being unavailable during the night phase, they may submit any night actions to be performed in advance. 
[*]If the mafia has not submitted their action by 24 hours before the night deadline, a reminder will be sent. 
[*]If the moderators do not receive an NA submission from any mafia by the night deadline, the mafia will not perform an action that night.
[*]Night will end when the moderators make a post declaring the end of night (EON). You may not post in the thread until then, even if the night deadline has passed. Instead, PM the mods for updates if they miss a deadline. 
[*]Players who are temporarily unable to fulfill activity requirements can declare a V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence) by posting the V/LA dates in [b]bold[/b] in-thread or in their role PM. Players on a V/LA will not be prodded. 
[*]V/LAs should be shorter than five days. For longer absences, contact the moderators for options. 
[*]Players who no longer wish to or are unable to play in this game can request replacement by posting [b]Request Replacement[/b] in-thread or in their role PM. 
[*]Players who have replaced out generally will not be allowed to replace back in. 
[*]Players will receive their first PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 48 hours and are not on V/LA. Details on "game-advancing post" are in the Moderation Policies tab.
[*]Players will receive their second PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 72 hours and are not on V/LA. 
[*]Players will be replaced if they have not made a game-advancing post for 96 hours and are not on V/LA, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement. 
[*]If a player receives 4 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
[*]If a player reaches replacement status more than once, they will be replaced.
[*]Activity Checks (ACs) will be posted periodically. Players may request a new AC in bold or in their role PM. 
[*]Activity will reset overnight. Players will not receive prods between twilight and daystart. 
[*]If you have access to a private topic, you may request that a partner be poked. The moderators will send a notification via PM to the specified player, but this will not count as an official prod.
[*]If a player is postbanned by the AoPS Sheriff, they will be replaced. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.[list][/hide]
[*][hide=Integrity and Etiquette]
[b]This tab covers integrity recommendations, player etiquette, warning limits, and examples of inconsiderate gameplay.[/b]
 
 
[list][*]Do not gamethrow. 
[*]Do not discuss player alignments based on V/LAs, replacements, warnings, force replacements, modkills, or other interactions with moderators. 
[*]Do not discuss rule violations, especially violations by other players in the thread. If you wish, contact the moderators privately through your role PM or Discord. 
[*]Any significant, game-related, and intentionally exclusive player-to-player communication outside of moderator-sanctioned channels is prohibited.
[*]Do not publicly reference OGI (Out of Game Information) in reads or create situations outside the thread that players could reasonably consider alignment indicative.[/list]
 
The above rules are attempts to preserve the spirit of the game and should not affect most players. For specific details and examples, [url=https://aops.com/community/p24617334]click here[/url]. 
 
 
[list][*]Do not make personal attacks. You may attack a player's opinion, but do not demean the player themselves. 
[*]Do not spam.
[*]Follow AoPS Community Guidelines and the AoPS Terms of Service.
[*]Be mature and use common sense.
[*]Behavior that disrupts the game for players and makes it unreasonably hard for them to read and play may result in a warning.
[b]Causing significant disruptions to gameplay may result in a force replacement at the moderators' discretion. 
[*]For minor rule infractions, first-timers can receive up to three warnings, while all other players can receive up to two. A player may receive multiple warnings for a single infraction.[/list]
 
The above rules broadly address most etiquette issues. For specific details and examples of improper behavior, [url=https://aops.com/community/p24617342]click here[/url].[/hide]
[*][b][url=https://aops.com/community/p24617357]- Moderation Policies -[/url][/b]
[*][hide=Moderator Information]
[b]This tab provides technical information about this game.[/b]
 
 
[list][*]ad333 and aidan0626 are the moderators of Mafia Game 312. 
[*]OTHER CONTRIBUTORS/UNPAID INTERNS have contributed to flavor, setup, OCRSTM, feedback, and management of the private chat discord system.
[*]This game uses the Unpaid Intern Central consolidated private chat system. Participants of this game will be granted access as appropriate.
[*][color=#FF0000]Red text[/color] is used for votecounts, warnings, and other announcements by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related text.
[*][color=#0000FF]Blue text[/color] is used for activity checks, confirm counts, and other non-essential posts by the moderators. 
[*][color=#00FF00]Green text[/color] is used for town flavor-related text.
[*]Custom shades of these colors may be used for aesthetic purposes. 
[*]Current custom shades are: Town flavor green v.2 ([b][color=#2be368]#2be368[/color][/b]) and Activity Check blue ([b][color=#005dff]#005dff[/color][/b]). For a full list of custom colors, [url=https://aops.com/community/p24617373]click here[/url]. 
[*]The moderators may change the rules at any time. Major rule changes will be announced at the bottom of the OP. All changes will also be noted in the modlog and OCRSTM Version History. 
[*]Players will not be retroactively penalized for violating new rules. 
[*]Major changes to the OP may be made in between games. The most important changes will be noted in the OCRSTM Version History. 
[*]The moderators pledge to treat players fairly and keep moderator interventions to a minimum; however, we reserve the right to make the final judgement in the moderation of this game.[/list]
 
[b]MG312 OP is based on Overcomplicated Ruleset[sup]TM[/sup] (OCRSTM) 10.[/b]

post_rendered:
The two organizers of the fruit show sit at the head and foot of a circular table, one of them deeply immersed in thought, and the other one designing posters to advertise the fruit show. While the tagline “like a dog show but for fruit” could’ve been better, the project was under a tight deadline, and there was more to be included on the poster, like the pleas for enthusiastic descriptions, and the hosting information.

…

“What name do you want on the posters”

“You can pick” came the half-aware reply, before the quick correction “Wait, no! Call me… the overseer! Because I oversee it, and it sounds cool. You can be The Other Overseer if you want. I guess you’re not Overseeing, so you can be… the Overseer’s friend”

“Alright then. And what is the grand prize?”

“I can’t tell you, it’s a secret!!”

“I don’t think that the grand prize being a secret is going to draw people in”

“Even if drawing people in was the goal, people love mysteries, it’ll gnaw at theem until they have no choice but to scour the earth for a suitable fruit to enter the show. But also it has to be a secret. Even you can’t know”

“How thrilling. Have you come up with your first category at least? I’m not not paying you to just sit there doing nothing”

“Amn’t I the one not paying you here?? But yeah I’ve got plenty of ideas! I think for the first one, we will test how they do under pressure.”

“I don’t think squeezing the fruits is a good idea, especially for the first round”

“Me neither? … Oh! I mean like psychological pressure. You know, to see if they can handle the life of a prize-winning fruit. We can stare at them, yell at them, circle around them menacingly talking about how much is on the line.”

“Well then. I don’t know if I can put that on the poster but it sounds like you’ve got it figured out”

“Yeah and since I’m done and you’re not I can help with the decorations!! I think I have some fruit contest signs in my closet”
Several days later

The Overseer’s Friend, as called by at least one person, invited the last person into the small room where the fruit show was to be held, and encouraged them to place their fruit in the remaining spot in a circle on the floor, which would appear to be some occult ritual for those who didn’t know better. This perception was not helped when the lights turned out, followed by the sound of exceedingly fast footsteps and then

“BOO! Hi everybody, it’s me, the fabled Overseer! Please excuse me as I go turn the lights back on.”

The lights came back on, the Overseer returned quickly, and began explaining “Hello everybody! Thank you all for coming, and I’m sorry that the space is so crowded. I was convinced that this event wouldn’t be so popular as to get seventeen people, but regardless we will proceed. This first round will test your fruits abilities to withstand the pressure that comes with the stardom that will follow should your fruit win. So without further ado, let the games begin, and may the best fruit win!!”

Upon the speech’s conclusion, the lights once again fell off, only this time everybody was accounted for. So then, there was only one possible explanation. Three of the fruits were evil, and would need to be disqualified in order for the rest of the competition to proceed. Discussion immediately emerged wondering which fruits could possibly be evil, but the only argument of note was the brief suggestion that the fruit show be cancelled due to the happenings, which the Overseer’s Friend quickly dismissed, with the following rationale: This was an important event after all, and this appearance of evil fruit would surely be studied for years to come. Besides, everybody came here to have fun, and what would be more fun than deducing the identities of traitors in their midst?


Day 1 has started on January 15th, 6:00 PM Pacific Time, and will end January 23rd, 6:00 PM Pacific Time.

post_rendered:
Despite the commotion, the Overseer faithfully narrated the goings-on of the game. “Oh it seems like we have a very intense competition going on right now, will any of these fruits crack under the stress, either metaphorically or figuratively? If not, word is that we will have to turn up the heat, so to speak. After all, somebody has to lose, but this watermelon seems rather determined that they will not lose yet.” Thankfully, by virtue of holding the position of a host without affiliation to the fruits, most suspicion was dealt elsewhere.

Over time, a lot of discussion fell towards one of the newest fruits, despite its potential and determination, everybody decided that something felt… off about this fruit. Perhaps there was some creature living inside of it, controlling its every decision, trying not to be noticed. They must be the source of the evil, they all just knew it!

As they were about to unleash their justice, The Overseer was clearing out the space around the fruits in order to isolate them from all that felt normal. But upon turning back, the watermelon was found smashed open. After a brief bit of shock, The Overseer continued narrating

“Well, it seems our first contestant has lost. And yet, indeed, it seems that that they were full of an evil energy. That’s the consequence of taking the dark path in life, it never gets you anywhere! Good luck to all future fruits, in the next round, which will be announced shortly.”

SwordAxe has been hanged. They were Watermelon, Mafia Goon.
Night 1 has started and will end on 1/29 6:00 PM PST.

post_rendered:
The Overseer and The Overseer’s friend briefly retired to a room to discuss how to proceed.

“Did you… not have a plan for the next round?”

“I was still thinking about it, but then it was over so quickly! And besides, you always need your plans to adapt on the fly. But don’t worry, I have many ideas planned, I just needed to take a moment, after all what happened to that watermelon…. I know it was done willingly but I still feel quite bad that my contest is having such ramifications. Maybe I should call the whole thing off.”

“No, don’t. It really is meaning a lot to these people, despite their arguments. Besides, they’re making great progress and soon enough they might dispel the evil spirits from the contest to make it more normal again. You’ve got this.”

“Right, I’ve got this! Anyhow, I’ve come up with my next idea, but it will require some preparation. I want to see how well they can roll down surfaces. Can you entertain the guests while I make the preparations for the course?”

“Of course.”

The Overseer was then left to construct the course, with only minor difficulties at trying to remember the proper methods of design. But those people, those fruits needed something like this, and so it had to be the best.

Meanwhile Outside

The Overseer’s Friend quickly noticed something was off. Where is the canteloupe? Upon asking, nobody could seem to recall such a fruit having been there.

"Haha very funny. Where is the cantaloupe?" But everybody seemed to truly believe there never was one in the first place. They talked about how watermelon got suddenly smashed in, but other than that nothing had happened.

BananaBall00 has disappeared. They were Cantaloupe, Vanilla Town. Day 2 starts now, and ends 2/6/2026, at 6:00 PM Pacific Time

nike - what stands out to me abt her is that she's voted aayr twice for reasons outside this game, which i think some ppl have thought is wolfy, but i feel like the tone she used doesn't sound reserved which is what id expect from wolves...
wist - tbh going through the thread theres no singular posts that make me tl her... its just like an overall towniness to her posts imo if that makes sense
bb00 - their posting has been towny, but i disagree with the ppl saying that their excitement is towny. bc ik they've wanted to rand scum in a mountainous game, + in 308 i can say that i was very excited there but i was scum. i also don't really get their sl on wist... but overall its still a tl + most of her posting is good
avanders - ok so their posts have been very towny, tho idk what mindset the sr on violet comes from. like i could see it as town just trying to look at someone who is being mainly townread from a different angle... or as a wolf trying to have non consensus reads. well, i disagree with the violet sr, and idk how to read that post from avanders so ig ill just leave it for now. but yeah i like all their other posts :p
theta - soo theta was towny from the start, and then kinda was just messing around, and then yesterday he kinda started posting better.. havent really seen anything wolfy from him yet
violet - his replies to questions on having a sr on bb00 were good imo. again, i just havent seen anything that would make me scumread him

so i do think all these slots are towny, but i also have paranoia bc ik that bb00/violet/theta can wolf really well, and i dont know how nike/wist/avanders would wolf but id assume theyre good also... so yeah i'm taking my own reads with a grain of salt knowing that these ppl can snow me easily :3

this post is a fun read because (FMPOV) cuz me/violet/wist/bb00 are town plus nike is p much locktown

whiiiich leaves theta sooo either theta is tmied town or this was a little "lets throw a survivor in here" (cuz theta was generally accepted as towny by post 533)

nike-"their tone seems like smth I wouldn't expect from a wolf"
wist-"overall towniness of posts"
BB00-"excitement is kinda scummy but most of their posting is good"
avan (me)-"towny posts, idk how to read, I like their other posts"
theta-"towny, messed around, posting better, haven't seen anything wolfy yet"
violet-"good replies, I haven't seen anything to make me sr"

So. This is interesting to me because there is an active tr (as in "they did X, which is towny") on nike, wist, bb, me, and violet

BUT for theta, there's no town/wolf judgement placed on any of theta's ACTIONS. "Posting better" is a value judgement, and "towny" is not attached to anything

still though, even accounting for the fact that count's analysis on violet/theta is pretty similar, iiiii don't love the way that count couldn't come up with an action that make him "townread" theta

whiiiich leaves theta sooo either theta is tmied town or this was a little "lets throw a survivor in here" (cuz theta was generally accepted as towny by post 533)

soooo going through counts reasons:

nike-"their tone seems like smth I wouldn't expect from a wolf"
wist-"overall towniness of posts"
BB00-"excitement is kinda scummy but most of their posting is good"
avan (me)-"towny posts, idk how to read, I like their other posts"
theta-"towny, messed around, posting better, haven't seen anything wolfy yet"
violet-"good replies, I haven't seen anything to make me sr"

So. This is interesting to me because there is an active tr (as in "they did X, which is towny") on nike, wist, bb, me, and violet

BUT for theta, there's no town/wolf judgement placed on any of theta's ACTIONS. "Posting better" is a value judgement, and "towny" is not attached to anything

Idk this is probably fairly confirmation biased by me cuz I feel like I'm assuming theta's scum in this analysis :/

still though, even accounting for the fact that count's analysis on violet/theta is pretty similar, iiiii don't love the way that count couldn't come up with an action that make him "townread" theta

Using pattern recognition is scan the odd one out because scan is the only other push by count besides swordaxe early game, or is theta simply the one person count felt confident reading as an alignment not true to their actual one?

Count's play in 308 was pretty simply explained. They did genuine solving and genuinely fit in because they were actively hunting wolves- assigning members of protoss as wolves, whether it be terran or protoss- it was all arbitrary. In this game, count seemingly TMI'd most of their reads and made uncontroversial takes. I mean, most of us see nike as "objectively" towny for valid reasons. Tone, solving, pushes, etc.. I think, in order to fit in with the village (as they've done in other ways that bob1 identified), what they did was they genuinely took solving at face value and put towny players as towny and let lhf/wolfy players be wolf, regardless of true alignment. This helps us by... not much, in all honesty, but goes to show that whenever a player was towny (to a majority or in a basic way), count would townread them.

The issue I see with theta is that he was not widely townread and his fluffy posts were just as easily attackable as tintin's imo. Count's attacks on tintin were actually fueled by violet because count felt more confident pushing a player who wasn't in good standings with a thread leader / town player. I think the same can be said for swordaxe. Theta didn't have people necessarily attacking him, but I also felt that he really had nothing going for him early game besides okay posts. So for count to put theta so high was either a result of a) genuine solving (something count found as towny), b) TMI (which I find less likely since I think there's just been a lucky correlation that towny players are towny- I don't think count was actively using TMI to make reads), or c) protecting her wolfpartner.

To me, (a) + (b) feels most plausible. I feel like count genuinely saw bb00 and nike and all of them as towny, but also was influenced by other players (this is much more accurately shown with their sparse wolfreads. They wolfread bob, swordaxe, and tintin, because they were actively being pushed, rather than actually having a wolfy trait about them for the most part in early game. It being early game is important because there's less information to make a genuine read from a towny but all the information about player alignments are right in front of a wolf. It's the point in the game where town doesn't know who to make friend or foe but wolves have an idea.). I'll have to re-read early game / when count was making those posts, but I think count found theta's tone and fluffiness towny partially because I think other players identified it as a townier, laid back approach to the game and count felt comfortable towning him. I think count jumped the gun and I think that's due to confirmation of theta being a safe player to read from TMI.

If theta is count's wolfpartner who was actually being towny, I also feel that count's TMI would place them at being more skeptical at townreading theta because there was some inner opposition to townreading a wolf that is in okay standing w/ thread compared to a towny player who is town and is in a good position to the thread.

When it comes to scan, pattern recognition obviously makes it look bad. Towny players who are now confirmed to be town were high in count's list. Some players (which, fmpov, includes sc7) who were wolfy/null but town, taylor put them in null. I think bob2 is a good example. Bob wasn't in good standing with the thread and taylor only voted him because it was the counter to swordaxe once the wagons really started to develop. Taylor could have felt confirmed to push bob much earlier, for being an lhf slot. However, I think she felt resistance to doing this because she knew bob was town. Her main two early game pushes (and, some of you backreading might say it's extremely weak to put tintin as a push since count js flamed him for being pr-carried and for being late. However, it's important to take into account that taylor was having trouble finding genuine wolfreads with reasoning and put most people at townreads or null. SwordAxe and Tintin are exempt from that.) were sword and tintin, and I think everything just stacks up to go against scan from taylor spew. I also think scan is within range in all honesty (sorry!).

However, what's stopping me from voting scan rn is past votecounts. Scan was early on swordaxe and taylor. Those wagons also being mainly pure (which in my opinion is coincidence simply because town heavily outnumbers wolves during this entire game) looks better for scan. But my honest thoughts against this that may just be tunneling is that scan is a vicious hellbusser and swordaxe would genuinely need to be facing old xarcade town to be able to evade being quickdropped for the first two days (and this playerlist isn't old xarcade town skill level btw). Count was also pretty cooked d2, and the unicode option was in all honesty a weak wagon (I was only on it because I hadn't backread the game at all).

I feel like {scipio, scan, theta} just has the last wolf in it and I think that the wolf is scan. (also, don't get me wrong- I made the post to explain theta's townier traits and scan's wolfier traits, which is why I order scan > theta. However, I think theta is also a great hang).

post_rendered:
Here’s a refresher.

Bob2 is towny and I wouldn’t want to hang him because count literally tried brute forcing a lim on him. I don’t believe too much in count interactions clearing people, but this is the one person where it should work. Count had such an unnatural progression on bob2 and clearly only Wolfread him once he started gaining traction. Any paranoia I have is that I think him staying alive for this long means he’s either wolf or wolf is desperately trying to implicate him to create a wifom f3. Also, he could possibly be wolf because count only pushed bob2 when it gained traction, similar to swordaxe. It’s just a question of “is this a genuine wolfread that others could understand so count pushes it” or is it “this is a townie that’s gaining traction and I think I pushed my partner to hard so now I gotta try and fix this”.

Aayr is towny because of his meta here. I think he’s been genuine most of this game, and he actually pushed me earlier in the game where my thread position was much more established, which I think is towny. Also, the way his reads develop read much more as town than as wolf. I have an older post detailing this. As town, his reads have less confidence, especially once they face resistance. This leaves him confused and somewhat frozen. As wolf, he has more control of the game and bases his reads off of whatever benefits his agenda, and then makes reasoning around that. Here, his reads are more contrarian and I think the way he’s handled the game leans more towny. I haven’t seen his wagons or they’re not clear in my mind but we’re also waiting on replacement so that’s not a viable hang.

Galaxy is mixed for me. On one hand, apparently count spew clears them (which works well enough for scipio) and I just haven’t re-read it. I was a fan of them being town d2 because literally everyone was on them and they were fluffing and I thought that they were towny in how they basically gave up, but this is also galaxy who can fake emotions semi-well as shown in 304 with their bs AtE wallpost. I think their posts have lacked genuine solving or thread presence in a minute which makes them wolfier. They play similarly to violet and violet literally wolfread them and said “I won’t be surprised when they make it to f5” sooooo yeah it just doesn’t look good for them. Also, because they play similarly to violet their self-confidence in being town means absolutely nothing to me. I think w!galaxy could pull this off but I think they have enough towniness to maybe survive 1 day. Maybe.

Bob1 is towny because of his solving and even if he was wrong about his scan read, he tried pretty hard to back it up with some solid reasoning. Yeah, I know he’s an experienced wolf, but he’s still towny. He’s had extremely good solving ability and I think he was the first one to take a committal stance on scipio, which I’m thankful for because he’s a lot easier to read now. Hopefully. My only paranoia on him is paranoia that he pocketed me because he suddenly jumped from not being able to read me and seeing me as randwolfy to instantly townreading me. Also, him townreading me and bob2 makes me feel like if he’s wolf his plan is to do something gimmicky with the nks and put himself in f3 against me and bob2 and then induce wifom onto me and put bob2 in a hard position. I think bob2 being alive this long either means bob2 is wolf or the wolf is trying to have some gimmicky f3, which I think only experienced wolves or really inexperienced wolves would do (so, Unicode or bob1 or Scipio).

Why I’m towny: many reasons here but the main one is that I literally protected scan with genuine reason and conversed with bob about my read, started doubting it, and I very slowly lost confidence in scan being town, and paranoia got to me. That’s such a natural progression that w!me couldn’t pull off (and speaking of natural progressions, I’m not pulling reads out of thin air. If I’m not explicitly explaining them with context you can probably figure out what changed my mind).

Also, during the scan read some of my confidence whittled down. Like, before I was confident scan wouldn’t let their partners go into that position, but in 308 I wasn’t looking at scan’s play that much because I wasn’t really playing the game at all. So when I heard that scan was a compulsive busser, initially I said no but I realized I hadn’t looked at scan for that. And so the confidence in my protection faded and I didn’t see a reason to continue pushing against bob1 when he was making points I genuinely couldn’t answer to.

Scipio1 is towny to me for multiple reasons:

1) Their nk reactions. I feel like their reaction to violet and avanders is +ev for them tbh. It reads as "that's not a krill I would've made", and honestly I don't think it's a krill scipio neccessarily makes. Like between avanders and galaxy as a nk (assuming w!scipio wants bob1 alive for protection and bob2 for the f3 gimmick, and vand and galaxy were pushing scipio), I feel like I'm the only one who dislikes galaxy while more people were feeling against vand (scan and I at one point). Considering he opened the day putting me in the poe, I don't think w!scipio considers me that night. The violet reaction is fine because violet's a difficult player to read and it's a fair tinfoil. I feel like scipio has some more awareness to keep violet alive because no one can really tell their range and paranoia on them could set in (which is a play scipio could've honestly made).

2) Count's entire essay on them. Count is a fair practicer of distancing/not townreading her partners and closely associating with them, and her affinity towards yapping endlessly about scipio for doing absolutely nothing just reads as town for scipio. Like she keeps on droning on about how scipio is towny and I mean it's unsolicited like scipio does not deserve this glaze. It's kind of hard to articulate why this isn't pairing, but it's not. Taylor's play this game was basically just socially townreading all towny slots (and because this game had more experienced players/better townies, that ended up being more slots), and her scipio townread also feels very much like "let me pocket him / get on his good side / have a good read on him".

3) Bob's entire essay on scipio. If bob1 is wolf then scipio is town. If bob1 is town, I feel like them establishing scipio when a good read hadn't been formed on them yet was a good move. Bob1's read made a lot of sense (and obviously as with scan it could be potentially wrong) but most of the reasons bob outlined are a pretty good reason to town scipio.

Most of the time I was literally just defining terms or I'd make a readlist with one sentence for each player and use some non-committal post-by-post point system ISO (which is a really bad way to play tbh). Here, even if I add a little less evidence for my reads, they aren't deadset and pre-planned like in that game. After all, I've switched up on my POE and readlists a countless number of times here. The reason why is because I'm constantly looking at new information others point out and considering it. As a wolf, I've already pre-planned what I'm going to say and what I want to push. It's much more opportunistic for the wrong reasons, and all of my pushes either clearly push an agenda or are clearly just fueling the fire. What I post isn't natural and doesn't show a genuine yearning to solve. Immediately focusing on one player to tunnel and figuring that it must be them after a nk or suddenly wolfreading a player in bad standing with the thread isn't a genuine yearning to solve, especially once it becomes a pattern (which was my XMG19 play in a nutshell). The progression is the key difference. In here, I clearly started day townreading scan, for reasons that I mentioned. Then Bob1 made a good counter to what I was saying, so my read drops slightly. Eventually, I start becoming paranoid of scan's range and really feel the need to hang them. I'm clearly conflicted all the way through- as a wolf, that doesn't get my point across. As wolf, I'd simply just pile on what BobD is saying without adding too much. The progression on avanders doesn't look that good when I say this, but I can explain that too. I didn't like how a lot of his solving was just ISOs with point system commentary, because that's exactly the natural route I took as a newbwolf. Basically, as wolf my reads might seem developed and well-made, but they have no natural progression to them for how much evidence I put backing into them.

I understand that saying this, in your mind, discredits the integrity of these differences. But I want you to read for yourself. What I'm saying now and what patterns I'm pointing out- It's not like I can change that they've happened in previous games. If you want, look at previous towngames and wolfgames I've played and try looking for these differences.

Vote: K124659

sorry if wrong. regardless of your alignment you've played a respectable game but i find it extremely hard to not vote you here.

probably the biggest thing you have going for you imo is that players have repeatedly expressed to me that this outside your wolfrange, but this is f3 and it's beyond the point where i really should be heeding that. when i read your posts as being a more capable wolf than i was led to believe... it becomes a lot harder to townread you. they are good and well written posts that show a lot of thought, and once again, very respectable regardless of your alignment. but i don't actually know how towny they are if i treat you as a random player, for whom i've been given no meta. a large part of this is that we've been playing a sk game, essentially, and this makes it a lot easier for the last wolf to post towny thoughts, because they don't have to play around their buddies. you've posted a lot of insightful things but these are things that can be posted from a position of tmi. and i was thinking about this and the fact i only really started finding your posts towny after both wolves died feels like it may be indicative of that.

you mentioned that your top townreads in aayr/galaxy both died, and that this is somehow a towntell for you? i disagree heavily, i think it's a wolftell. bob2 isn't interested in murking aayr or galaxy over you. whereas wolves do tend to murk their non-consensus top townreads alot. i tinfoiled you upon aayr dying (i don't know if i said this but i did) because of that too, though i wasn't really invested enough to make a concentrated effort to really and truly tinfoil you

overall i think the spew reasons to read bob2 as town seem alot more solid. and frankly having read back, i actually find bob2 to feel significantly purer than you socially too, particularly in this f3 (though i'm not sure any of the posts this f3 did anything besides further cement my inclination to vote you)

tbh my mind was sort of made up from the beginning of the cycle, i wanted to give you a chance to convince me but i'm not really interested in dragging this on further and this just feels correct to me. i'm not really sure you can post much that would have made me change my mind, and i don't want to make you waste your effort

you played a great game regardless of your alignment, and i respect the amount of heart you poured into this game. i appreciate it alot, and i'm sorry that it wasn't enough for you. if you're town, i think also it's impressive that you voted correctly here.

to my other villagers, i'm very sorry for not having had the proper investment or motivation for this game, and having allowed it to get to this point. i consider myself to be a much better player than that, and even if i vote correctly here, i hope that i can be forgiven for having dropped the ball and having pushed out villagers (largely scan).

i figured i owed it to all of you to really think deeply about the game this f3 and this is my best guess having done that

i hope i've made the correct decision here, gl. thanks for the game
